flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Monterey Peninsula College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Monterey Peninsula College fell 29% between 2009 and 2010 (9.3% → 6.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Monterey Peninsula College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($532 → $678).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Monterey Peninsula College rose 20% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $4.5k).
